content: Windows SmartScreen reputation is built per-file-hash and per-publisher; unsigned installers get warnings until enough clean downloads accumulate reputation (weeks, hundreds of installs), and reputation resets on every new unsigned build. EV code-signing certs no longer instantly clear SmartScreen (changed March 2024) — reputation still builds over time even with EV. Cheapest mitigation for a free/indie tool without a signing cert: clear in-installer messaging telling users to click 'More info' > 'Run anyway', not disabling SmartScreen.
